nasb.text: Moses told Aaron all the words of the Lord with which He had sent him, and all the signs that He had commanded him to do.

esv.text: And Moses told Aaron all the words of the Lord with which he had sent him to speak, and all the signs that he had commanded him to do.

cnv.text: 摩西把耶和華派他所說的一切話，和吩咐他所行的一切神蹟都告訴了亞倫。

ccb.text: 摩西把耶和华吩咐他的以及要他行的神迹都告诉了亚伦。
